disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden appearance of round, well-defined patches of hair loss that have expanded rapidly over about 24 hours
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me what your hair loss looks like?
How quickly did this come on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It came on over a day — there are a few round bald patches and they seem to be getting bigger at the edges. Hair comes out in clumps when I touch it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Burning, painful sensation across the scalp accompanying the shedding
trigger_question_examples: Is there any pain or unusual sensation on your scalp?
What does the burning feel like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My whole scalp is burning and painful — it's a horrible stinging, burning feeling that won't stop.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The skin under the patches feels and looks smooth and normal, with no sores, thick flaking, pus or crusting
trigger_question_examples: What does the skin on the bald patches look like?
Is there any redness, flaking, blistering or pus on your scalp?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The skin on the bald patches actually looks smooth and normal to me — no flaking, no sores, no pus, it just looks bare.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute severe anxiety and panic with hyperventilation, racing heart, insomnia and a sense of being unable to cope
trigger_question_examples: How are you coping with this emotionally?
You sound very distressed — can you tell me how you're feeling right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Honestly I'm panicking — my heart is racing, I can't catch my breath properly, I didn't sleep at all and I feel completely overwhelmed and terrified.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known autoimmune thyroid disease, on thyroid hormone replacement
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any medical conditions?
Do you have any thyroid or autoimmune problems?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I have an autoimmune thyroid condition and I take levothyroxine 100 micrograms every day.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Screening for thoughts of self-harm or inability to stay safe during the acute distress
trigger_question_examples: When people feel this overwhelmed, they sometimes have thoughts of harming themselves — has anything like that crossed your mind?
Do you feel safe on your own right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No... I haven't thought about hurting myself, I just feel completely overwhelmed and frightened and I don't want to be alone with this.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't really want to talk about that... I'm just scared about my hair.
